title: gh-132713: Fix repr(classmethod) race condition
author: vstinner
body:
Hold a strong reference to the callable while calling repr(classmethod).

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body: My fix is incomplete, the [reproducer](https://github.com/python/cpython/issues/132713#issuecomment-2828743431) does still crash. [Calling `__init__()` concurrently is not supported](https://github.com/python/cpython/issues/127192#issuecomment-2495552818), so I prefer to close my PR.
